title: CoS-checked done-flip + citation discipline in skill prose (D1/D3)
action: Per CONTEXT D1 and D3 (docs/history/decision-propagation/CONTEXT.md): (1) bee-scribing SKILL.md — the D11b done-flip rule (line ~96) becomes CoS-checked: at flip time enumerate EVERY CoS clause of the matched backlog row and cite delivered evidence per clause; any clause without evidence -> the row does NOT flip — it stays in-flight and its CoS text gains a 'Delivered:' / 'Remaining:' annotation naming the subset; splitting the remainder into a new row is allowed when the delivered subset is independently shippable; silent full-flip on partial delivery is never allowed. (2) bee-compounding SKILL.md — the D11b fallback (line ~81) inherits the identical per-clause rule (compounding never flips looser than scribing). (3) Citation discipline (D3): in bee-scribing's reference (scribing-reference.md) add the rule that a backlog row / spec section / CONTEXT-plan passage encoding a decision cites its short8 id, so the dp-2 supersede sweep can reach it; note that uncited embodiments are the residual risk. (4) Keep wording tight and in each skill's existing voice; these are prose rules (D7 of scribing: prose-ruled, never hook-enforced). Then render_plugin_skill_trees + release_manifest --write + --check, full run_verify. Proof of wording: grep-visible presence of the per-clause rule, the Delivered/Remaining annotation, and the short8 citation rule in the three touched files.

truths: scribing D11b text requires per-clause CoS evidence and forbids full-flip on partial delivery, with Delivered:/Remaining: annotation
compounding fallback carries the identical rule
citation discipline (short8 in citing artifacts) present in the scribing reference
prohibitions: Do not weaken or remove the existing scribing-owns-the-flip ownership

trace.outcome: CoS-checked done-flip in scribing + identical never-looser compounding fallback + short8 citation discipline in the scribing reference

skills/bee-compounding/SKILL.md:81: under the identical per-clause CoS check as scribing, never looser (D1, decision `b9b9fee3`) ... Delivered:/Remaining: annotation ... silent full-flip on partial delivery is never allowed here either.
skills/bee-scribing/references/scribing-reference.md:159-161: new "## Citation Discipline (D3)" — artifacts encoding a decision cite the short8 id; uncited embodiments are the residual risk. Also amended lines 106/140/152 to point at short8.

SKILL.md:81 identical rule + explicit 'never looser' bind.
